name: FabFitFun
tagline: Quarterly beauty & lifestyle box with $200+ value
description: Curated beauty, skincare, wellness, and lifestyle products delivered quarterly. Each box includes 5-7 full-size and deluxe-size items from premium brands like Tarte, Tatcha, and more. Great for trying high-end beauty products at a 60-70% discount.

name: Birchbox
tagline: 5 curated beauty samples + 1 full-size item monthly
description: Discover new beauty and grooming products with 5 carefully curated samples each month from premium brands. Perfect for trying luxury skincare and makeup without commitment. Includes a full-size item ($20+ value).

name: Ipsy
tagline: 5 personalized beauty products + full-size item monthly
description: Get 5 personalized beauty products based on your unique beauty profile and preferences. Quiz-based AI curation ensures items match your style and skin type. Glam Bag includes items worth $50+.

name: Loot Crate
tagline: Monthly exclusive licensed collectibles for geeks
description: Exclusive licensed collectibles, apparel, and gear curated for pop culture fans. Monthly themes rotate around blockbuster movies, binge-worthy TV shows, video games, and comics. Each crate worth $45+.

name: Manga Box
tagline: Latest manga volumes + anime figures monthly
description: Get the latest manga volumes, collectible anime figures, and exclusive Japanese pop culture merchandise each month. Curated for serious fans of anime, manga, and Japanese culture.

name: SnackCrate
tagline: 12-15 international snacks from 3 countries monthly
description: Discover 12-15 unique, authentic snacks and treats from 3 different countries each month. Perfect for adventurous eaters and experiencing flavors you won't find in local grocery stores.

name: NomBox
tagline: 7-8 gourmet artisan snacks from independent makers
description: Handpicked, premium gourmet snacks from independent artisan makers. Each box features 7-8 high-quality items focusing on small-batch production and unique flavors you can't find in stores.

name: CrunchLabs
tagline: Buildable mechanical engineering toys for kids 10+
description: Interactive buildable mechanical toys that teach real engineering principles. Designed for kids 10+. Each monthly design combines building challenges with practical mechanical functions.

name: KiwiCo
tagline: Age-appropriate STEM & arts projects for kids 0-16
description: Monthly hands-on crafts and building projects designed by engineers and educators. Available for ages Toddler through Teens (0-16). Each project integrates STEM learning with creative play.

name: OwlCrate
tagline: Exclusive YA releases + bookish merch monthly
description: Exclusive new Young Adult book releases plus curated bookish items including candles, bookmarks, art prints, and collectibles. Perfect for teen readers, book lovers, and collectors building their library.

name: Scribd
tagline: Unlimited e-books, audiobooks & magazines
description: Access millions of books, audiobooks, magazines, and podcasts. Stream online or download to read and listen offline. Cancel anytime, ad-free experience.

name: Rotten Tomatoes Popcorn
tagline: Movie-themed snacks & exclusive collectibles
description: Limited-edition movie merchandise, exclusive popcorn flavors, collectible figures, and items from current blockbuster releases. Themed around trending films and entertainment.

name: Mythical Beast
tagline: Exclusive creator merchandise from YouTube stars
description: Official exclusive merchandise and collectibles from popular YouTube creators and online personalities. Each monthly box features surprises from different creators and entertainment figures.

name: Fitness Box
tagline: Gym gear, supplements & recovery tools monthly
description: Curated fitness essentials including gym accessories, protein snacks, recovery tools, and workout supplements. Designed for active lifestyles and fitness enthusiasts.

name: Better World Club
tagline: Eco-friendly sustainable lifestyle products
description: Sustainably sourced, eco-conscious products including reusable items, natural cosmetics, and planet-friendly alternatives to everyday products. Support sustainable living.

name: Bulu Box
tagline: Healthy snacks, vitamins & supplement samples
description: Try trending health and nutrition products including healthy snacks, vitamins, protein bars, and supplements without buying full sizes. Great for discovering new favorite brands.

name: GameFly
tagline: Rent video games for any console
description: Rent the latest video games for PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo, and more. Build your queue, games arrive by mail, keep multiple games at once. Return when finished.

name: Wildcraft
tagline: Monthly DIY craft & art projects for kids
description: Creative DIY art and craft projects with all supplies included. Designed for creative kids and families to explore painting, sculpting, and artistic expression.

name: Graze
tagline: Nutritionist-curated healthy snack boxes
description: Portion-controlled, nutritionist-curated healthy snack boxes delivered on your schedule. Features nuts, dried fruits, seeds, and wholesome treats perfect for work or meal prep.

name: Dollar Shave Club
tagline: Premium razors + grooming essentials monthly
description: Premium razor blades delivered monthly at a fraction of department store prices. Includes shaving cream, aftershave, skin care products, and other grooming essentials.

name: Le Temps
tagline: Luxury spa & self-care products monthly
description: Premium luxury bath, body, and skincare products curated from high-end brands. Each box is designed for pampering and self-care experiences at home.
